documentationFeedback: Documentation is clear and accurate. The 'client_advertise (April 2026)' section explains the problem well and covers both deployment paths. Minor gap: no 'how to verify in production' section (e.g., checking NATS monitoring endpoint). Not blocking.
observations: P2: Tests are happy-path only — no edge cases for empty routes, empty machineName, or special characters
P2: No negative assertion for 172.17.x bridge IPs in test suite
P2: No automated test for render-nats-peer.sh (Compose path)
Pre-existing TS5107 moduleResolution=node10 deprecation in infra tsconfig — unrelated to PR
Trailing newline difference between Pulumi and Compose output (cosmetic, NATS ignores)
Live cluster verification (routez, JetStream persistence) requires Tailscale-connected host — not CI-testable
